title: vitis quinquangularis var. kelungensis
intro: Vitis quinquangularis var. kelungensis, also known as the five-angled grapevine, is a plant species within the Vitaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Taiwanese and Chinese traditional medicine, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Vitis quinquangularis var. kelungensis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically processed into a decoction or infused in hot water to make a tea, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
